SELECT 
   WNICE.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY 
   ,WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY
   ,WNICE.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,WNICE.TRX_CLASS_CD     
   ,CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN 
   CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  <> 'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
    WNICE_P.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
   END
  ELSE
   CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE =  'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
    COALESCE(NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,WNICE.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME)
   END
  END AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
   ,CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN 
   CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  <> 'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
    WNICE_P.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
   END
  ELSE
   CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE =  'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
    WNICE.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
   END
  END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT 
   ,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
   ,WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  
   ,WNICE.GL_DT
   ,WNICE.SS_CODE
   ,WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY  
   ,COALESCE(WNIVI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
   ,WNICE.AMOUNT 
   ,(CASE WHEN WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) *  WNICE.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
   ,WNICE.FISCAL_ID
   ,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
   ,WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   ,WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
   ,WNICE.GL_POSTED_DT
   ,WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
   ,WNICE.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD
   ,WNICE.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
   ,WNICE.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
   ,WNICE.SK_TRX_ID_INT
   ,WNICE.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT
   ,WNICE.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   ,WNICE.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   
   ,WNICE.PRODUCT_QTY 
 FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_OA_OM WNICE
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON WNICE.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
   ON WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CD= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
   AND WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
   ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CD
   AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = WNICE.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OA_OM  WNIVI
   ON WNICE.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNIVI.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT,SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT FROM
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NXOA WHERE NXOA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='N' GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) WNICE_P
    ON WNICE.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT = WNICE_P.SK_TRX_ID_INT
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII 
   ON WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
   AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
   ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
   AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE  = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
   AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNICE.TRX_DATE
   AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate'  
 WHERE
    ( UPPER(WNICE_P.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME) = 'DAILY RATES') 
    AND WNICE.TRX_CLASS_CD = 'CM'
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OA_OM X WHERE X.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNICE.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY )

SELECT DISTINCT
 NXOA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
 NXOA.AR_TRANSACTION_KEY,
 NXOA.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 NXOA.BK_COMPANY_CD,
 NXOA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 NXOA.GL_DT,
 NXOA.GL_POSTED_DT,
 NXOA.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURR_CODE, 
 NXOA.PRODUCT_KEY AS ITEM_KEY,
 NXOA.SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID,
 NXOA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
 NXOA.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
 NXOA.REVENUE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD,
 NXOA.TRX_FNCTNL_CURRENCY_CONV_DT, 
 NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
 NXOA.FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
 NXOA.DEBIT_TRXNL_AMT,
 NXOA.CREDIT_TRXNL_AMT,
 NXOA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION_CNT,
 NXOA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
 NXOA.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
 NXOA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
 NXOA.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,
 NXOA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 NXOA.TRX_CLASS_CD,
 NXOA.SS_CD,
 WI.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 NXOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 NXOA.PRODUCT_QTY ,
 NXOA.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NXOA   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_OA_OM WI
   ON (WI.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY=NXOA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY) 
   WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_TRX_OA_OM NCR 
   WHERE NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY=NXOA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY)

SELECT 
   WNICE.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY 
   ,WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY
   ,WNICE.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,WNICE.TRX_CLASS_CD    
   ,CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN 
   CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  <> 'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
    WNICE_P.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
   END
  ELSE
   CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE =  'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
    COALESCE(NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,WNICE.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME)
   END
  END AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
   ,CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN 
   CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  <> 'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
    WNICE_P.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
   END
  ELSE
   CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE =  'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
    WNICE.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
   END
  END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT 
   ,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
   ,WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  
   ,WNICE.GL_DT
   ,WNICE.SS_CODE
   ,WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY  
   ,COALESCE(WNIVI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
   ,WNICE.AMOUNT 
   ,(CASE WHEN WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) *  WNICE.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
   ,WNICE.FISCAL_ID
   ,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
   ,WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   ,WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
   ,WNICE.GL_POSTED_DT
   ,WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE /*CHK*/
   ,WNICE.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD
   ,WNICE.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
   ,WNICE.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
   ,WNICE.SK_TRX_ID_INT
   ,WNICE.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT
   ,WNICE.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   ,WNICE.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
   ,WNICE.PRODUCT_QTY 
 FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_OA_OM WNICE
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON WNICE.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
   ON WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CD= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
   AND WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
   ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CD
   AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = WNICE.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OA_OM  WNIVI
   ON WNICE.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNIVI.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT,SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT FROM
   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NXOA WHERE NXOA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='N' GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) WNICE_P
   ON WNICE.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT = WNICE_P.SK_TRX_ID_INT
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII 
   ON WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
   AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
   ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
   AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE  = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
   AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNICE.TRX_DATE
   AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate'   
 WHERE
   ( NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  LIKE '%VARIABLE%' OR UPPER(NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME) = 'DAILY RATES' )
   AND UPPER(COALESCE(WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE,'NA')) =  'REVENUE TRANSFER'
   AND WNICE.TRX_CLASS_CD = 'CM'
   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OA_OM X WHERE X.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNICE.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY )

SELECT
   WNRTC.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD AS ACCOUNT_CLASS,
   WNRTC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
   COALESCE(SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID, SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID) AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
   COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
   WNRTC.ACCTD_AMOUNT     AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
   'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
   NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
   NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
   NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
   WNRTC.AMOUNT      AS AMOUNT,
   1 AS BATCH_ID,
   NULL        AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
   NULL        AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
   WNRTC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT    as CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
   NULL        AS COGS_PERCENT,
   NULL        AS COMMENTS,
   WNRTC.CONTEXT       AS CONTEXT,
   current_timestamp(0)     as CREATE_DATETIME,
   1         as CREATED_BY,
   current_timestamp(0)     AS CREATION_DATE,
    -9999 AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
  NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT AS  CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
    NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
    WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
   NULL         AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
   'INV'        AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
   WNRTC.FISCAL_ID     AS FISCAL_ID,
   'F'        AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
   WNRTC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE     AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
   current_timestamp(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
   WNRTC.GL_DT     AS GL_DATE,
   WNRTC.GL_POSTED_DT, 
   NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    AS GLOBAL_NAME,
   NULL AS GROUPING_ID,
   NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT  AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
   WNRTC.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD                  AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,   
   NULL       AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
   NULL        AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
   current_timestamp(0)    AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
   1       AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
   'Y'        AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
   NULL       AS LINE_PERCENT,
   SC_TV.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT  AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT, 
NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE       AS LINE_TYPE,
   NULL       AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
CASE  WHEN SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD ='O' THEN SSO_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
    ELSE NULL
END  AS  ORDER_HEADER_ID ,
 CASE WHEN  WNGL.LINE_ID = -9999  THEN 
      CASE WHEN SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' THEN SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT
        ELSE NULL
      END
    ELSE WNGL.LINE_ID
  END  AS  ORDER_LINE_ID , 
  WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER   as ORDER_NUMBER,
   WNRTC.ORG_ID      AS ORG_ID,
   NULL       AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
   NULL       AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
   'Y'        AS QUOTA_FLAG ,  
   NULL        AS REASON_CODE,
   0       AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
   NULL       AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
   CASE WHEN NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL 
    ELSE 999   
  END AS REQUEST_ID,
   COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE,WNRTC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT) AS  RULE_START_DATE,
     SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,  
SC_TV.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT AS SALESREP_ID ,
    NULL           AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
    NULL           AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
   NULL           AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
   WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE,
    SC_TV.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS SPLIT_PERCENT,
  0 AS TERRITORY_ID,
 CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
    END AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
   'O'          AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE ,
   WNRTC.PRODUCT_QTY AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
   WNRTC.TRX_DATE,
   NULL       AS TRX_NAME,
  WNRTC.TRX_NUMBER,
  WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD AS TRX_TYPE, 
   NULL       AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
   NULL       AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
   'INV'      AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
   WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
   WNRTC.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
     SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE AS  BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   SC_TV.SALES_REP_NUMBER    SALES_REP_NUMBER,  
   SC_TV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   WNRTC.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
   SC_TV.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT   AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
    FROM 
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_OA_OM WNRTC 
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=WNRTC.SS_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_GET_LINES_OA_OM WNGL 
  ON WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNGL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACCT_RULE_OA_OM WNGAR  
    ON WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNGAR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_OA_OM WSCF
  ON WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WSCF.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE 
    ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    AND SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR 
    ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME        
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON (WNRTC.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY ) 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  SC_TV 
   ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WSCF.LINE_ID 
   AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE 
   AND SC_TV.SS_CD =  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE

   
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC
    ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NSOL_SC.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
    AND SC_TV.SS_CD = NSOL_SC.SS_CODE
    AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'

  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC
   ON NSOL_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY

    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
    ON  WNRTC.FISCAL_ID = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
WHERE 
WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'N'

SELECT
   WNRTC.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD AS ACCOUNT_CLASS,
   WNRTC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
   COALESCE(SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID, SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID) AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
   COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME ) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
   WNRTC.ACCTD_AMOUNT     AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
   'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
   NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
   NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
   NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
   WNRTC.AMOUNT      AS AMOUNT,
   1 AS BATCH_ID,
   NULL        AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
   NULL        AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
   WNRTC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT    as CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
   NULL        AS COGS_PERCENT,
   NULL        AS COMMENTS,
   WNRTC.CONTEXT       AS CONTEXT,
   current_timestamp(0)     as CREATE_DATETIME,
   1         as CREATED_BY,
   current_timestamp(0)     AS CREATION_DATE,
    -9999 AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
  NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT AS  CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
    NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
    WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
   NULL         AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
   'INV'        AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
   WNRTC.FISCAL_ID     AS FISCAL_ID,
   'F'        AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
   WNRTC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE     AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
   current_timestamp(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
   WNRTC.GL_DT     AS GL_DATE,
   WNRTC.GL_POSTED_DT, 
   NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    AS GLOBAL_NAME,
   NULL AS GROUPING_ID,
   NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT  AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
   WNRTC.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD                  AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,   
   NULL       AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
   NULL        AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
   current_timestamp(0)    AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
   1       AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
   'Y'        AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
   NULL       AS LINE_PERCENT,
   NULL AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT, 
   NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE      AS LINE_TYPE,
   NULL       AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AS  ORDER_HEADER_ID ,
 WNGL.LINE_ID AS  ORDER_LINE_ID , 
  WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER   as ORDER_NUMBER,
   WNRTC.ORG_ID      AS ORG_ID,
   NULL       AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
   NULL       AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
   'Y'        AS QUOTA_FLAG ,  
   NULL        AS REASON_CODE,
   0       AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
   NULL       AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
   CASE WHEN NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL 
    ELSE 999   
  END AS REQUEST_ID,
   COALESCE(WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE,WNRTC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT) AS  RULE_START_DATE,
   COALESCE(ESCT_INIT_VAR.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0) AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,  
CASE
WHEN WSCF.METRIX_FLAG ='Y' THEN COALESCE(ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.SALES_REP_ID,0) 
   ELSE COALESCE(ESP_INIT_VAR_I.SALES_REP_ID,0) 
 END
AS SALESREP_ID ,
    NULL           AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
    NULL           AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
   NULL           AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
   WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE,
  100 AS SPLIT_PERCENT,
  0 AS TERRITORY_ID,
 CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
    END AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
   'O'          AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE ,
   WNRTC.PRODUCT_QTY AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
   WNRTC.TRX_DATE,
   NULL       AS TRX_NAME,
  WNRTC.TRX_NUMBER,
  WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD AS TRX_TYPE, 
   NULL       AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
   NULL       AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
   'INV'      AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
   WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
   WNRTC.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
   'Direct Sales' BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   NDEF.SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,  
   COALESCE(NDEF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,DEF_RULE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY),
   WNRTC.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
   -999 AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT  
    FROM 
	(SELECT * FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_CNTRY_SLS_CREDIT_DEFAULT_TV WHERE BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = 'UNK' AND END_TV_DT='3500-01-01' AND  UPPER(BK_TRX_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'REVLINE' ) DEF_RULE,
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_OA_OM WNRTC 
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=WNRTC.SS_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_GET_LINES_OA_OM WNGL 
  ON WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNGL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACCT_RULE_OA_OM WNGAR  
    ON WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNGAR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_OA_OM WSCF
  ON WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WSCF.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
  ON WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSO.SS_CODE   
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
  ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE 
    ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    AND SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR 
    ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME        
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON (WNRTC.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY ) 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_INIT_VAR
  on ESCT_INIT_VAR.NAME  = 'Direct Sales'
  AND ESCT_INIT_VAR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP    ESP_INIT_VAR_IF              
  ON ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.SALES_REP_NAME  = 'FSO Metrix Invoice' 
  AND ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP    ESP_INIT_VAR_I              
  ON ESP_INIT_VAR_I.SALES_REP_NAME  = 'MISC. U.S.' 
  AND ESP_INIT_VAR_I.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR             
  ON EST_INIT_VAR.TERRITORY_NAME   = 'MISC. U.S.' 
  AND EST_INIT_VAR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CSTMR_ACCT_LOCATR_ASGN_TV ASGN
  ON NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = ASGN.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY 
  AND ASGN.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR_TV LOC
  ON ASGN.LOCATOR_KEY = LOC.LOCATOR_KEY 
  AND LOC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_CNTRY_SLS_CREDIT_DEFAULT_TV NDEF
  ON NDEF.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = LOC.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
  AND NDEF.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01'
  AND UPPER(NDEF.BK_TRX_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'REVLINE' 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
    ON  WNRTC.FISCAL_ID = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
WHERE 
WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'Y'

SELECT 
   WNICE.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY 
   ,WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY
   ,WNICE.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,WNICE.TRX_CLASS_CD  
   ,WNICE.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  
   ,WNICE.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT 
   ,WNICE.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
   ,WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  
   ,WNICE.GL_DT
   ,WNICE.SS_CODE
   ,WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY  
   ,COALESCE(WNIVI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
   ,WNICE.AMOUNT 
   ,(CASE WHEN WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) *  WNICE.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
   ,WNICE.FISCAL_ID
   ,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
   ,WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   ,WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
   ,WNICE.GL_POSTED_DT
   ,WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
   ,WNICE.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD
   ,WNICE.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
   ,WNICE.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
   ,WNICE.SK_TRX_ID_INT
   ,WNICE.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT
   ,WNICE.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   ,WNICE.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   
   ,WNICE.PRODUCT_QTY                    
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_OA_OM WNICE
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON WNICE.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
   ON WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CD= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
   AND WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OA_OM  WNIVI
   ON WNICE.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNIVI.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
   ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
   AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE  = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
   AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNICE.TRX_DATE
   AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate'   
   WHERE
WNICE.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME in ('Daily Rates','Immediate')

SELECT
  WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
  ,WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD                  
  ,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
  , WNRTC.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
  ,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
  ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OA_OM WNRTC
  WHERE
  WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD = 'DM'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
   WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT  =  WNRTC.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
   AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE
   AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I')
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_OA_OM Y WHERE  WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY  = Y.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY )

SELECT
   WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
   ,NOARL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD
   ,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
   ,NOARL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   ,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
   ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OA_OM WNRTC
 INNER JOIN (
/*SELECT NOA_PAR.SK_TRX_ID_INT,SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NOA
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NOA_PAR
 ON NOA.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT = NOA_PAR.SK_TRX_ID_INT
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
 ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NOA_PAR.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 GROUP BY 1,2,3*/

  
SELECT NOA_PAR.SK_TRX_ID_INT,SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NOA_PAR
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
 ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NOA_PAR.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  WHERE EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NOA WHERE   NOA.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT = NOA_PAR.SK_TRX_ID_INT AND NOA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG='N' )

  GROUP BY 1,2,3
 
) NOARL
    ON WNRTC.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT = NOARL.SK_TRX_ID_INT
   WHERE
   WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD IN ('CM','DM')
   AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
       WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT   =  NOARL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
       AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE
       AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I'
      )
   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_OA_OM Y WHERE
       WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY  = Y.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY )
 
 UNION ALL /*NRS Change */
 
 
 SELECT
    WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
    ,NOARL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    ,WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD
    ,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
    ,NOARL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
    ,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
    ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
    FROM
    $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OA_OM WNRTC
  INNER JOIN (
  SELECT NOA_PAR.SK_TRX_ID_INT,SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NOA_PAR
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
 ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NOA_PAR.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 WHERE EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NOA WHERE   NOA.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT = NOA_PAR.SK_TRX_ID_INT )
 GROUP BY 1,2,3
  ) NOARL
     ON WNRTC.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT = NOARL.SK_TRX_ID_INT
    WHERE
    WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD IN ('CM','DM')
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
        WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT   =  NOARL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
        AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE
        AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I'
       )
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_OA_OM Y WHERE
        WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY  = Y.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY )

SELECT
 WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 ,WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD                  
 ,CASE WHEN WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD = 'CM' THEN 'C' ELSE 'I' END SOURCE_TYPE
 , NULL SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
 ,'N' AS METRIX_FLAG
 ,'Y' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OA_OM WNRTC
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_OA_OM Y WHERE  WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY  = Y.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY )

SELECT
 WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 ,WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD
 ,'O'  SOURCE_TYPE
 , WNGL.LINE_ID
 ,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
 ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OA_OM WNRTC
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_GET_LINES_OA_OM WNGL
 ON WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNGL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 WHERE
 WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD IN ('INV','CM','DM')
 AND
 (EXISTS 
 
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X
  WHERE X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
  AND X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = WNGL.LINE_ID
  AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE)
 )
 UNION ALL
 SELECT
 WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 ,WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD
 ,'O'  SOURCE_TYPE
 , WNGL.LINE_ID
 ,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
 ,'Y' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OA_OM WNRTC
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_GET_LINES_OA_OM WNGL
 ON WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNGL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
 WHERE
 WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD IN ('INV','CM','DM')
 AND COALESCE(WNGL.LINE_ID,-1) > 0
 AND NOT EXISTS
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
  WHERE X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' 
  AND X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = WNGL.LINE_ID
  AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE)

SELECT
  WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
  ,WNRTC.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD
  ,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
  , WNRTC.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
  ,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
  ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OA_OM WNRTC
  WHERE
  WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD = 'INV'
  AND EXISTS
  ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
     WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT   =   WNRTC.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
     AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE
     AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
    )
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_OA_OM Y WHERE  WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY  = Y.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY )

SELECT 
   WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
 CASE WHEN  WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
    NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
  ELSE 
   WNRTC.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
  END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
  CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
    COALESCE(WNIVI.GL_DATE,WNRTC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT)       
  ELSE WNRTC.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
  END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OA_OM WNRTC
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OA_OM  WNIVI
   ON WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNIVI.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII
   ON WNRTC.PRODUCT_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
    AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = WNRTC.ORG_ID  
   WHERE
   WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD = 'CM'

SELECT
  NXOA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,MIN(NXOA.GL_DT) AS GL_DATE,MAX(NXOA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  FROM
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NXOA
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON NXOA.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_OA_OM WNICE WHERE NXOA.SK_TRX_ID_INT = WNICE.SK_TRX_ID_INT)
  AND NXOA.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
  AND NXOA.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE'
  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
  GROUP BY NXOA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY

UNION ALL /* NRS Change */

SELECT
   NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY,MIN(NXOA.GL_DT) AS GL_DATE,MAX(NXOA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
   FROM
    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NXOA 
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
     ON NXOA.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_OA_OM WNICE WHERE NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY = WNICE.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY) 
   AND NXOA.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
   AND NXOA.ACCT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE'
   AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
   GROUP BY NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY

SELECT
 WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY ,
 WNRTC.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
 CASE WHEN NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
  ELSE 
      CASE WHEN EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <= 0 OR EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN 
         CASE WHEN WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD IN ('CM','DM') THEN 0 WHEN WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD = 'INV' THEN -9999 END
      ELSE EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID  END
  END AS LINE_ID,
  CASE WHEN NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT IS NOT NULL THEN NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
  ELSE
   CASE WHEN WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD IN ('CM','DM')  AND NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) END
  END AS ORDER_NUMBER
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OA_OM WNRTC
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON  WNRTC.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
 ON WNRTC.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL
 ON EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
 AND EORCTLOL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
 ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
 AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
 ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_AR
 ON NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_AR.SALES_ORDER_KEY

SELECT
  WNRTC.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
  ,WNRTC.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,WNRTC.TRX_CLASS_CD                  
  ,'C'  SOURCE_TYPE

SELECT 
    WNICE.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY 
    ,WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY
    ,WNICE.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    ,WNICE.TRX_CLASS_CD     
    ,CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN 
    CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  <> 'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
     WNICE_P.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
    END
   ELSE
    CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE =  'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
     COALESCE(NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,WNICE.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME)
    END
   END AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
    ,CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN 
    CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  <> 'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
     WNICE_P.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
    END
   ELSE
    CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE =  'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
     WNICE.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
    END
   END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT 
    ,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
    ,WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  
    ,WNICE.GL_DT
    ,WNICE.SS_CODE
    ,WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY  
    ,COALESCE(WNIVI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
    ,WNICE.AMOUNT 
    ,(CASE WHEN WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) *  WNICE.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
    ,WNICE.FISCAL_ID
    ,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
    ,WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
    ,WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
    ,WNICE.GL_POSTED_DT
    ,WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
    ,WNICE.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD
    ,WNICE.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    ,WNICE.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
    ,WNICE.SK_TRX_ID_INT
    ,WNICE.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT
    ,WNICE.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
    ,WNICE.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   
    ,WNICE.PRODUCT_QTY 
  FROM
    $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_OA_OM WNICE
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON WNICE.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
    ON WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CD= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
    AND WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
    ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CD
    AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
    AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = WNICE.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OA_OM  WNIVI
    ON WNICE.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNIVI.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
    INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT,SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT FROM
    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NXOA 
	--$$ETLVWDB.EL_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_BIB NXOA 
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) WNICE_P
    ON WNICE.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT = WNICE_P.SK_TRX_ID_INT
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
     ON WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII 
    ON WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
    AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
    ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
    AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE  = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNICE.TRX_DATE
    AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate'  
  WHERE
     ( UPPER(WNICE_P.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME) = 'DAILY RATES') 
     AND WNICE.TRX_CLASS_CD = 'CM'
     AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OA_OM X WHERE X.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNICE.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY )

  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
  ON  NXOA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
  INNER JOIN  (SELECT  SK_TRX_ID_INT,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE
  --$$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE 
               WHERE ACCT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE' 
               QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SK_TRX_ID_INT ORDER BY NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY   )=1) NX
   ON NXOA.SK_TRX_ID_INT=NX.SK_TRX_ID_INT
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
  ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NX.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
   ON NXOA.AR_BATCH_SRC_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  INNER  JOIN  (SEL  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY   ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
  FROM 
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NXOA 
  --$$ETLVWDB.EL_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_BIB NXOA 
  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
  ON NXOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
 WHERE TRX_SRC_CD='OM'
 AND REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD = 'REVENUE_SHARE'
 GROUP BY 1,2,3) NXOA1
  ON NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY    = NXOA1.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY    
  WHERE NXOA.REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD = 'REVENUE_SHARE'
  AND NXOA.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
  AND NXOA.TRX_SRC_CD='OM'
  AND NXOA.GL_DT  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
  AND  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND  NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR
  WHERE  DRVDR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY   
  AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV' 
  AND DRVDR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY>0
   AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  IN ('BIB','BIB OFFSET') 
   )
  AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB1
  WHERE DRVDB1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY   
  AND DRVDB1.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
  AND DRVDB1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY>0
   AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  IN ('BIB','BIB OFFSET') 
   )
    UNION ALL
  SELECT
  EXNOAS.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
  'REC' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  EXNOAS.AR_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  EXNOAS.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  EXNOAS.BK_COMPANY_CD,
  ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
  EXNOAS.GL_DT,
  EXNOAS.GL_POSTED_DT,
  EXNOAS.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURR_CODE,
  NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,  
  EXNOAS.PRODUCT_KEY,
  EXNOAS.DEAL_ID,
  EXNOAS.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
  NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,
  EXNOAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT,
  EXNOAS.REVENUE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD,
  EXNOAS.TRX_FUNCTIONAL_CURR_CONV_DT, 
CASE WHEN EXNOAS.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'BIB' THEN (EXNOAS.FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT-EXNOAS.FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT) 
	  WHEN EXNOAS.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'BIB OFFSET' THEN (EXNOAS.FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT-EXNOAS.FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT) ELSE 0 END 	  AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
 CASE WHEN EXNOAS.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'BIB' THEN (EXNOAS.CREDIT_TRXNL_AMT-EXNOAS.DEBIT_TRXNL_AMT) 
	  WHEN EXNOAS.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'BIB OFFSET' THEN (EXNOAS.CREDIT_TRXNL_AMT-EXNOAS.DEBIT_TRXNL_AMT) ELSE 0 END AS AMOUNT,
  EXNOAS.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_DRTN_CNT,
  EXNOAS.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT,
  EXNOAS.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
  EXNOAS.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT,
  -7777 RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  NULL AS  CONTEXT,
  EAMPD.FISCAL_ID,
  EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID,
  NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME        AS TRX_DATE,
  NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER       AS TRX_NUMBER,
  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT, 
  ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
  ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,
  EXNOAS.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,
  NXOA1.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE,
  EXNOAS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  EXNOAS.TRX_CLASS_CD,
  NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
  EXNOAS.SS_CODE,
  NXOA1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT, 
  EXNOAS.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  EXNOAS.PRODUCT_QTY 
   FROM
    $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
    $$EXCEPDB.EX_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_OA_OM EXNOAS
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
  ON EXNOAS.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT                           
  ON EXNOAS.AR_TRANSACTION_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
  ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EXNOAS.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
  ON  EXNOAS.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
  INNER JOIN  (SELECT  SK_TRX_ID_INT,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE
                 WHERE ACCT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE' 
               QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SK_TRX_ID_INT ORDER BY NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY   )=1) NX
   ON EXNOAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT=NX.SK_TRX_ID_INT
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
  ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NX.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
 INNER  JOIN  (SEL  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,NXOA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY   ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
 FROM 
 --$$ETLVWDB.EL_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_BIB NXOA
 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NXOA 
 INNER JOIN 
 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL ON NXOA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
 WHERE TRX_SRC_CD='OM'
 AND REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD = 'REVENUE_SHARE'
 GROUP BY 1,2,3) NXOA1
  ON EXNOAS.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = NXOA1.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY    
  WHERE EXNOAS.REVENUE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD = 'REVENUE_SHARE'
  AND EXNOAS.GL_POSTED_DT <> '3500-01-01'
  AND GL_DT  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
  AND  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND  NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR
  WHERE  DRVDR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = EXNOAS.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
  AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
  AND DRVDR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY>0 
   AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BIB','BIB OFFSET') 
   )
  AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB1
  WHERE DRVDB1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = EXNOAS.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
  AND DRVDB1.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
  AND DRVDB1.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY>0
   AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BIB','BIB OFFSET') 
   )

SELECT 
    WNICE.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY 
    ,WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY
    ,WNICE.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    ,WNICE.TRX_CLASS_CD    
    ,CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN 
    CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  <> 'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
     WNICE_P.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
    END
   ELSE
    CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE =  'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
     COALESCE(NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,WNICE.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME)
    END
   END AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
    ,CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN 
    CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  <> 'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
     WNICE_P.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
    END
   ELSE
    CASE WHEN WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE =  'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
     WNICE.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
    END
   END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT 
    ,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
    ,WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  
    ,WNICE.GL_DT
    ,WNICE.SS_CODE
    ,WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY  
    ,COALESCE(WNIVI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
    ,WNICE.AMOUNT 
    ,(CASE WHEN WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) *  WNICE.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
    ,WNICE.FISCAL_ID
    ,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
    ,WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
    ,WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
    ,WNICE.GL_POSTED_DT
    ,WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE /*CHK*/
    ,WNICE.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD
    ,WNICE.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    ,WNICE.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
    ,WNICE.SK_TRX_ID_INT
    ,WNICE.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT
    ,WNICE.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
    ,WNICE.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
    ,WNICE.PRODUCT_QTY 
  FROM
    $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_OA_OM WNICE
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON WNICE.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
    ON WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CD= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
    AND WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
    ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CD
    AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNICE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
    AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = WNICE.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OA_OM  WNIVI
    ON WNICE.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNIVI.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
    INNER JOIN (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT,SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT FROM
    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NXOA 
	--$$ETLVWDB.EL_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_BIB NXOA 
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) WNICE_P
    ON WNICE.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT = WNICE_P.SK_TRX_ID_INT
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII 
    ON WNICE.PRODUCT_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
    AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
    ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNICE.BK_TRX_ISO_CURRENCY_CD
    AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE  = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNICE.TRX_DATE
    AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate'   
  WHERE
    ( NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  LIKE '%VARIABLE%' OR UPPER(NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME) = 'DAILY RATES' )
    AND UPPER(COALESCE(WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE,'NA')) =  'REVENUE TRANSFER'
    AND WNICE.TRX_CLASS_CD = 'CM'
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OA_OM X WHERE X.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY = WNICE.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY )
